{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TB subgraph "Docker Container" subgraph "retold-databeacon" NODE["Node.js 20"] APP["DataBeacon Service
Port 8389"] NODE --> APP end VOL["/app/data
(volume mount)"] APP --> VOL end subgraph "External Databases" DB1["MySQL Server"] DB2["PostgreSQL Server"] DB3["MSSQL Server"] end subgraph "Ultravisor Mesh" COORD["Ultravisor Coordinator"] OTHER["Other Beacons"] COORD --- OTHER end subgraph "Consumers" UI["Web Browser
(built-in UI)"] API["REST API Clients"] MESH["Mesh Work Items"] end APP -->|"TCP connections"| DB1 APP -->|"TCP connections"| DB2 APP -->|"TCP connections"| DB3 APP -->|"WebSocket"| COORD UI -->|"HTTP :8389"| APP API -->|"HTTP :8389"| APP COORD -->|"Work items"| APP ","style":"notebook"}
